enerated.md`"}],["$","li","l-202-20",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`docs/zk/enforced-runtime.generated.json`"}],["$","li","l-202-21",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`docs/zk/enforced-operator-flow.md`"}],["$","li","l-202-22",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`docs/zk/external-closure.json`"}],["$","li","l-202-23",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`docs/zk/external-closure.generated.md`"}],["$","li","l-202-24",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`docs/zk/external-closure.generated.json`"}],["$","li","l-202-25",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`docs/runtime-attestation.generated.json`"}],["$","li","l-202-26",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`docs/operational-evidence.generated.md`"}],["$","li","l-202-27",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`docs/operational-evidence.generated.json`"}],["$","li","l-202-28",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`docs/governance-runtime-proof.generated.md`"}],["$","li","l-202-29",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`docs/governance-runtime-proof.generated.json`"}],["$","li","l-202-30",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`docs/wallet-compatibility-matrix.generated.md`"}],["$","li","l-202-31",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`docs/devnet-canary.generated.md`"}],["$","li","l-202-32",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`docs/devnet-resilience-report.md`"}],["$","li","l-202-33",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`docs/fair-voting.md`"}]]}]}]

1a:["$","$1","block-29",{"children":["$","h2","h2-246",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-3xl","children":"Notes"}]}]
1b:["$","$1","block-30",{"children":["$","ul","l-260",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-260-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"This runtime evidence package is Devnet-focused and reviewer-visible."}],["$","li","l-260-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"It does not replace real device QA across every wallet release and browser combination."}],["$","li","l-260-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"It binds browser/runtime behavior to diagnostics, wallet matrix, canary, resilience evidence, and real-device capture intake in one summary."}],["$","li","l-260-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"Wallet support matrix status is not treated as review-readiness by itself; browser-wallet and real-device captures drive the evidence-backed readiness counts."}],["$","li","l-260-4",{"className":"list-disc","children":"It includes a dedicated governance runtime proof packet so reviewers can see the difference between shipped wallet-first lanes and still-pending browser or device captures."}],["$","li","l-260-5",{"className":"list-disc","children":"It now carries a separate browser-wallet runtime intake so live web governance claims stay tied to actual injected-wallet captures instead of code paths alone."}],["$","li","l-260-6",{"className":"list-disc","children":"It exposes the MagicBlock confidential payout corridor as a separate runtime track instead of burying it inside generic payout claims."}],["$","li","l-260-7",{"className":"list-disc","children":"It adds a Frontier integration package that binds ZK anchors, MagicBlock settlement, REFHE settlement, and backend-indexed RPC state into one machine-checked review surface."}],["$","li","l-260-8",{"className":"list-disc","children":"It exposes the stronger zk_enforced runtime blocker as a first-class evidence track instead of leaving it implicit in prose."}],["$","li","l-260-9",{"className":"list-disc","children":"It tracks the remaining external closure path: runtime captures, external audit, and the canonical verifier-boundary freeze."}]]}]}]
